mapper.sql: id, settleSeq, dispatchId, dispatchSeq, progressDesc, progressRatio, acceptanceDesc, acceptanceRatio, ratio, amount, memo, confirmTime, paymentTime, remark, state, sseId, year, quarter, month, customInfo, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, disabled
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_dispatch_project_settlement (settleSeq, dispatchId, dispatchSeq, progressDesc, progressRatio, acceptanceDesc, acceptanceRatio, ratio, amount, memo, confirmTime, paymentTime, remark, state, sseId, year, quarter, month, customInfo, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, disabled ) values (#{settleSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dispatchId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dispatchSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{progressDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{progressRatio,jdbcType=REAL}, #{acceptanceDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acceptanceRatio,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ratio,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{amount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{confirmTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{paymentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sseId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{year,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{quarter,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{month,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{customInfo,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT} )

mapper.update:
update pm_dispatch_project_settlement
settleSeq = #{settleSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dispatchId = #{dispatchId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dispatchSeq = #{dispatchSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
progressDesc = #{progressDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
progressRatio = #{progressRatio,jdbcType=REAL},
acceptanceDesc = #{acceptanceDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
acceptanceRatio = #{acceptanceRatio,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ratio = #{ratio,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
amount = #{amount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
memo = #{memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
confirmTime = #{confirmTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
paymentTime = #{paymentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sseId = #{sseId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
year = #{year,jdbcType=INTEGER},
quarter = #{quarter,jdbcType=INTEGER},
month = #{month,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customInfo = #{customInfo,jdbcType=OTHER},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update pm_dispatch_project_settlement set settleSeq = #{settleSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dispatchId = #{dispatchId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dispatchSeq = #{dispatchSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, progressDesc = #{progressDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, progressRatio = #{progressRatio,jdbcType=REAL}, acceptanceDesc = #{acceptanceDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, acceptanceRatio = #{acceptanceRatio,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ratio = #{ratio,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, amount = #{amount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, memo = #{memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, confirmTime = #{confirmTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, paymentTime = #{paymentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, state = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sseId = #{sseId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, year = #{year,jdbcType=INTEGER}, quarter = #{quarter,jdbcType=INTEGER}, month = #{month,jdbcType=INTEGER}, customInfo = #{customInfo,jdbcType=OTHER}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

select * from pm_dispatch_project_settlement
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
settleSeq = #{model.settleSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dispatchId = #{model.dispatchId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dispatchSeq = #{model.dispatchSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
progressDesc = #{model.progressDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
progressRatio = #{model.progressRatio, jdbcType=REAL} AND
acceptanceDesc = #{model.acceptanceDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
acceptanceRatio = #{model.acceptanceRatio, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ratio = #{model.ratio, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
amount = #{model.amount, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
memo = #{model.memo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
confirmTime = #{model.confirmTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
paymentTime = #{model.paymentTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
state = #{model.state, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
sseId = #{model.sseId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
year = #{model.year, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
quarter = #{model.quarter, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
month = #{model.month, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
customInfo = #{model.customInfo, jdbcType=OTHER} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
( settleSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or dispatchSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or progressDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or acceptanceDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or acceptanceRatio like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ratio like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or amount like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or memo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or customInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from pm_dispatch_project_settlement
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
settleSeq = #{model.settleSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dispatchId = #{model.dispatchId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dispatchSeq = #{model.dispatchSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
progressDesc = #{model.progressDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
progressRatio = #{model.progressRatio, jdbcType=REAL} AND

acceptanceRatio = #{model.acceptanceRatio, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

amount = #{model.amount, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
memo = #{model.memo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
confirmTime = #{model.confirmTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
paymentTime = #{model.paymentTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
state = #{model.state, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
sseId = #{model.sseId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
year = #{model.year, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
quarter = #{model.quarter, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
( settleSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or dispatchSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or progressDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or acceptanceDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or acceptanceRatio like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ratio like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or amount like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or memo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or customInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
